title: Explosive Barrels
description: This mod adds immersive and customizable explosives to minecraft!
body:
# Explosive Barrels 💣

Bring proper explosives to Minecraft with two new barrels, fully integrated into vanilla progression and crafting, but far more satisfying to use than plain TNT.

---

![The explosive barrels in a field of grass.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71f454a97361b1b90ff4c2dd19dfca292b6b0f84.png)

![Showing off the inventory of a wooden explosive barrel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d4185f465eec06a8e21380f550995144b20638e_0.webp)

![A wooden explosive barrel with a medium sized charge exploding in a field of grass.](https://i.imgur.com/Id41T7Q.gif)

![The netherite nuke destroying a village.](https://i.imgur.com/sB3kN6R.gif)

---

## Overview

Explosive Barrels adds:

* A configurable **Wooden Explosive Barrel** for precision blasting
* A late-game **Netherite Explosive Barrel** that acts as a vanilla-friendly “nuke”
* New explosive powders with escalating power
* Explosion modifiers that let you tune fire, power and drops
* Custom crafting/smithing recipes for every new item

All explosions are **custom coded** to feel more **realistic and impactful** than vanilla TNT, making base clearing, mining and chaotic experiments far more fun.

---

## Wooden Explosive Barrel, the ol' reliable

The wooden barrel is your new go-to explosive block.

### Power levels

Load it with different explosive fillings to control its raw strength:

* **Gunpowder** – familiar TNT-like power
* **Flash Powder** – stronger, brighter, more intense explosions
* **Blitz Powder** – the top-tier payload for serious craters

Each tier raises the explosion power, letting you choose exactly how destructive you want to be.

### Explosion modifiers (“catalysts”)

You can further tune the explosion by adding familiar items as **catalysts** inside the barrel:

* **Coal** – slightly increases power and adds a bit of fire
* **Blaze Powder** – dramatically increases fire, great for burning areas down
* **Feathers** – boosts **item drops**, perfect for blast-mining resources

Mix and match fillings and catalysts to get exactly the kind of blast you want.

---

## Netherite Explosive Barrel, the late-game “nuke”

When you are ready for true end-game destruction, upgrade to the **Netherite Explosive Barrel**.

* Crafted via **smithing** with netherite components
* Fueled by a **single Nether Star**
* Produces a **massive explosion** while still feeling fair and “vanilla-friendly”

It is the perfect tool for large-scale terraforming, base wiping in late-game worlds, or just seeing how far you can push your machine.

---

## Better explosions, instant detonation

Explosions in Explosive Barrels are **not** reusing vanilla TNT logic. They are custom coded to feel:

* More **physical and satisfying**
* More **fun to play with** than standard TNT blasts

And crucially:

* **Barrels explode instantly** when triggered – there is **no fuse**.

This makes them ideal for traps, redstone contraptions, and precise timing setups where TNT’s delay would get in the way.

---

## TNT still matters

Explosive Barrels are not a replacement for TNT, they are a **specialist alternative**:

* **Barrels**: instant, powerful, configurable explosions that stay put
* **TNT**: has a fuse, can be pushed, moved by pistons, and chained in flying machines

If you want a movable explosive entity or large TNT machines, you still want TNT.
If you want controlled, instant blasts with lots of customization, you want Explosive Barrels.

---

## Crafting & progression

All new items come with **custom recipes**:

* Burst charges and explosive barrels have their own **crafting recipes**
* The Netherite barrel is obtained via **smithing**, fitting neatly into vanilla progression
* The mod is fully playable in survival, no commands or cheats required

---

Install Explosive Barrels, grab some powder and catalysts, and start experimenting.
You will not want to go back to plain TNT.
